title: Custom validator composed into a pipeline
prompt: Write a reusable custom validator `validate_non_overlapping_ranges/3` that takes a changeset, a start field name, and an end field name, and adds an error if end is strictly before start. It must handle nil values without crashing and compose correctly in a changeset pipeline via `|>`. Then apply it to a Reservation schema with :check_in and :check_out fields. Write to lib/my_app/reservations/reservation.ex.
tier_rationale: Requires a reusable parameterized validator with nil-handling. Hard because the API design matters.
